info.name: Gestlio – Notifications & Push
info.description:
In-app + push notification system for all four actors.

Delivery model:
- Every notification is stored in Mongo and pushed live over Socket.io to the recipient's personal room (events: `notification:new`, `notification:unreadCount`). This powers the real-time bell/badge on BOTH the admin/super-admin dashboard and the host website — no push permission required.
- OneSignal push ONLY fires when the recipient has a registered `playerId`. Only the host/cleaner MOBILE APP registers one (via POST /user/device-token), so admins, super admins and web clients never receive a push — exactly as required.

Roles:
- host / cleaner → in-app (web) + push (app)
- admin / super admin → in-app dashboard only (no push)

Set collection variables:
- baseUrl (e.g. http://localhost:6050/api/v1)
- token (JWT of the logged-in user — any role)
- notificationId (an id from 'Get my notifications')
- playerId (OneSignal subscription id from the mobile SDK)

query.description: filter by type e.g. dispute, new_user, message

request.description: Paginated list of the current user's notifications, newest first. Returns `{ data, unreadCount, meta }`. Auto-saves the first id into {{notificationId}} for the requests below.
Lightweight badge count for the bell icon. Returns `{ unreadCount }`.
Marks a single notification as read (scoped to the owner). Emits `notification:unreadCount` over the socket.
Clears the unread badge for the current user. Emits `notification:unreadCount` = 0.
Removes a single notification from the current user's list.
Called by the host/cleaner MOBILE APP after the user grants push permission. Saves the OneSignal `playerId` on the user so future notifications also fire a push. Web clients never call this.
Called on logout / when push is revoked. Clears `playerId` so the device stops receiving pushes.
